RM220/#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL TRACEY MLODOZENIEC, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. AN AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIECHWIADOWICZ, EVE SUED AS NIECHWJADOWICZ, EVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 600 - 41ST AVENUE, APT #2, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED THRU 3/1/98. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT&DAMAGES. PLTF TO USE BEST EFFORTS TO ENSURE DEFT HAS QUIET ENJOYMENT OF THE PREMISES. $250- SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS INTEREST WILL BE HANDLED ACCORDING TO LAW.
